zh.Chilton, Suffolk, , England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可爾頓
zh.Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Ogard於1442年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde34歲，母親Alice Lovell29歲。她於1453年與Sir Renfrey Arundel在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1521年在英國英格蘭素福爾可爾頓享年79歲。

zh-hans.Buckinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Ogard于1442年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde34岁，母亲Alice Lovell29岁。她于1453年与Sir Renfrey Arundel在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1521年在英国英格兰素福爾可爾頓享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ogard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized, of   Bogaard   or   Boogaard  . This surname is also found in the adjacent part of Germany (compare   Bongard  ).

variants.name: Bogaard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Dirk, Godfried.

Dutch (also Van den Bogaard): topographic name for someone living by an orchard, Dutch boomgaard, or a habitational name for someone from any of various places called with this word. Compare Bogard , Bogardus , and Boogaard .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Ogard was born in 1442, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde, was 34 and her mother, Alice Lovell, was 29. She married Sir Renfrey Arundel in 1453, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1521, in Chilton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Ogard est née en 1442, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Lovell, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Renfrey Arundel en 1453, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1521, à Chilton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Ogard 1442 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde 34 und ihre Mutter Alice Lovell 29. Sie hat 1453 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Renfrey Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1521 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Chilton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Ogard è nata il nel 1442 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Alice Lovell, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Renfrey Arundel nel 1453, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1521, nel Chilton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Ogardが1442年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogardeは34歳，母Alice Lovellは29歳であった。1453年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでSir Renfrey Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1521年にイギリスイギリススフォルクチルトンで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Ogard(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Lovell(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Sir Renfrey Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 치턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Chilton, Suffolk, , England: Chilton, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Ogard nasceu em 1442, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Lovell, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Renfrey Arundel em 1453, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1521, em Chilton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Ogard родилась в 1442 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Lovell, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Renfrey Arundel в 1453 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1521 г. в местности чилтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Ogard nació en 1442, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Lovell, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Renfrey Arundel en 1453, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1521, en Chilton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
